description_long: This is a modern-style couch featuring a wooden frame with exposed arms and legs, and deep blue, glossy cushions for both the seat and backrest. The frame is constructed from a medium-toned wood, with slatted detailing visible on the back. The seat and back cushions are divided into two sections each, providing seating for two to three people. The cushions appear thick and plush, with a smooth, shiny finish that suggests a vinyl or leather-like upholstery. The armrests are flat and wide, matching the wood of the frame, and the legs are straight and slightly tapered. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern wooden-framed couch with glossy blue seat and back cushions, divided into two sections and featuring wide, flat armrests. The design is minimalist with exposed wood and a sleek, shiny upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the divided blue seat and back cushions, wide wooden armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the cushions, the flat wooden armrest, and the straight, exposed wooden leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted wooden backrest and the continuous blue back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the cushions and armrest from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all divided at the center, with no visible accent or throw pillows; cushions appear loose but fit snugly within the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, straight wooden legs of medium height, slightly tapered, matching the frame and armrests in material and finish.
attribute_armrest_design: Flat, wide, straight wooden armrests at seat height, extending the full depth of the couch, with no padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with two large, loose blue cushions supported by a slatted wooden frame; cushions are not tufted or segmented beyond the central division.
